description: Create and activate a LimeSurvey titled 'Personnel Data Verification 2025' using the credentials admin/Admin123!. The survey must include a question group named 'Employee Details' containing three questions: 'Emergency Mobile' (Short Free Text) with an input mask of (999) 999-9999 and the 'Hide tip' attribute enabled; 'Desk Location Code' (Short Free Text) with an input mask of 99-99-999; and 'Current Annual Salary' (Numerical Input) with a minimum value of 20000, a '$' prefix, a 'USD' suffix, and the 'Integer only' setting.
